nodes.name: Sooty honeyeater
nodes.summary: Sooty honeyeater（Melionyx fuscus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Sooty honeyeater。

nodes.name: Sooty honeyeater
nodes.summary: The sooty honeyeater (Melionyx fuscus) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found in the New Guinea Highlands. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. This species was formerly placed in the genus Melidectes. It was moved to the resurrected genus Melionyx based on the results of a molecular phylogenetic study published in 2019. At the same time the common name was changed from "sooty melidectes" to "sooty honeyeater". References
nodes.shortSummary: The sooty honeyeater (Melionyx fuscus) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is found in the New Guinea Highlands.

nodes.name: Melionyx
nodes.summary: Melionyx（Melionyx）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Sooty honeyeater、短髭大蜜鳥、Long-bearded honeyeater。
